meaning: v.隆隆声,辘辘行驶,低沉地说n.隆隆声,辘辘声,吵嚷声
examples: The silence of the night was punctuated by the distant rumble of traffic.
I hear the rumble of thunder in the distance.
I heard the rumble of thunder in the distance.
Rumble is of course built-in, and the unit and its attachments are completely wireless.
The rumble of allegations makes it increasingly difficult for the court to satisfy both sides.
